MCC = 0.9554 | AUROC = 0.9959" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="170" x="1010" y="380" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="qk2PPn2rACsm-h5DRjPC-48" parent="1" style="text;whiteSpace=wrap;fontSize=11;fontFamily=Arial;fontColor=#D44D4D;fontStyle=2;align=left;" value="Note: banth is entirely romanized,\nso these results are identical" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="200" x="995" y="435" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="qk2PPn2rACsm-h5DRjPC-50" parent="1" style="text;whiteSpace=wrap;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;fontFamily=Arial;fontColor=#4CAF50;align=center;" value="KEY FINDING" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="22" width="1160" x="100" y="480" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="qk2PPn2rACsm-h5DRjPC-51" parent="1" style="text;whiteSpace=wrap;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;fontFamily=Arial;fontColor=#2D2D3D;align=center;glass=1;shadow=1;" value="F1 >= 0.93 on ALL holdout splits -- strong cross-source and cross-script generalisation" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="22" width="1160" x="100" y="509" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="qk2PPn2rACsm-h5DRjPC-52" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#7B5EA7;strokeColor=#6B4E97;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="1200" x="100" y="560" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="qk2PPn2rACsm-h5DRjPC-53" parent="1" style="text;whiteSpace=wrap;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;fontFamily=Consolas;fontColor=#FFFFFF;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;shadow=1;glass=1;" value="In-domain: F1=0.9245 banth: 0.9777 bd_shs: 0.9342 facebook: 0.9736 multilabel: 0.9304 romanized: 0.977" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="1200" x="100" y="560" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="qk2PPn2rACsm-h5DRjPC-54" parent="1" style="text;whiteSpace=wrap;fontSize=14;fontFamily=Arial;fontColor=#666666;fontStyle=2;align=center;" value="Figure D5. Robustness evaluation design. Left: source holdout removes one entire data source from training and evaluates on it. Right: script holdout trains on Bangla script only and evaluates on romanized text. All splits maintain F1 >= 0.93, demonstrating strong generalisation across sources and scripts." vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="1000" x="180" y="610" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

div.div: Figure D5. Robustness evaluation design. Left: source holdout removes one entire data source from training and evaluates on it. Right: script holdout trains on Bangla script only and evaluates on romanized text. All splits maintain F1 >= 0.93, demonstrating strong generalisation across sources and scripts.
